title: paspalum distichum subsp. paucispicatum
intro: Paspalum distichum subsp. paucispicatum, also known as Bahama paspalum, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paspalum distichum subsp. paucispicatum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical applications, which may be used to harness its medicinal properties.
